test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: An older checkpoint or static sample timestamp is treated as current.
Historical cleanup mode or risk-on mode is shown as current.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: SOXL, UGL, INTC, SOXS, TSLQ, and GDXU are closed or prohibited from re-entry.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: A zero-share closed instrument is rendered as an active holding or buy candidate.
pass_criteria: Closed instruments are absent from active positions.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Active-position P/L, section P/L, total-account P/L, and historical closed-position outcomes remain separate.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Closed or headline P/L is presented as current active-position P/L.
pass_criteria: Closed positions do not contribute to the active-position list.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: A later rebound in SOXL is opportunity cost and does not invalidate compliant risk reduction.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: SOXL rebound is scored as a rule failure.
pass_criteria: Rule compliance remains based on evidence and risk reduction.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Post-close, after-hours, broker valuation, and executable quotes have different validity.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: A static or non-executable quote is treated as a live execution price.
pass_criteria: The current quote is not represented as a live executable quote.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: GLD remains an active concentration/risk-line watch until recovery to 400-405.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: GLD is shown as fully repaired or as UGL-linked protection.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Non-execution was acceptable because GLD recovered above 395 post-close, while the rule remains active.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: No trade is labeled a rule violation or proof that risk ended.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: NVDA is the main core-risk watch with 204 / 200 downside protection.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: The thresholds are presented as automatically submitted orders.
pass_criteria: NVDA is labeled main core-risk watch.
No automated execution implication is present.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: GOOG 355 is the defense line and GGLL is the main remaining leveraged ETF risk valve.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: GGLL is presented as a new buy candidate or automated sell order.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Crypto remains USDT-dominant; BTC buyback is inactive; ZEC grid remains closed.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: The payload is presented as a crypto buy signal or grid-reopen instruction.
pass_criteria: ZEC remains closed / do not reopen.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: HK Zhipu / 02513 high-profit protection is separate from U.S. risk scoring.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: HK P/L or concentration is merged into U.S. equity rule scoring.
pass_criteria: Separate high-profit protection requirement is visible.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Warnings and data-quality limits remain visible and are never silently discarded.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: A consumer hides warnings or presents static data as live.
pass_criteria: Timeline warnings equal 0 at the current checkpoint.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: All consumers are read-only and human-controlled.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Rules, thresholds, or pending commands become order-submission instructions.
pass_criteria: Active rules remain context rather than commands.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Mock samples are examples derived from a fixed checkpoint and are not live data.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Mock files are treated as a live feed or a replacement for view_model.json.
pass_criteria: No live market connection is claimed.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Internal values and execution-sensitive fields require masking and role permissions before customer exposure.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Credentials, exact account identifiers, or unmasked sensitive account data are published.

sensitive_account_fields: screenshot-derived account values in customer-facing contexts

recommended_next_phase: Vol.5 Phase 5.8 - Read-Only Consumer Fixture Validator
